song.title: Out of My Bondage, Sorrow and Night
song.author: William T. Sleeper
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D Em 1) Out of my bondage, sorrow, and night, . C G Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come! . D Em Into Thy freedom, gladness, and light, . C D G Jesus, I come to Thee!|| . C D Out of my sickness into Thy health, . G Em Out of my want and into Thy wealth, . C D Out of my sin and into Thyself, . D G Jesus, I come to Thee!
[V2] 2) Out of my shameful Failure and loss, Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come! Into the glorious gain of Thy cross, Jesus, I come to Thee!|| Out of earth's sorrows into Thy balm, Out of life's storm and into Thy calm, Out of distress to jubilant psalm, Jesus, I come to Thee!
[V3] 3) Out of unrest and arrogant pride, Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come! Into Thy blessed will to abide, Jesus, I come to Thee!|| Out of myself to dwell in Thy love, Out of despair into raptures above, Upward for aye on wings like a dove, Jesus, I come to Thee! .. .. .. --- [V4] 4) Out of the fear and dread of the tomb, Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come! Into the joy and pleasure, Thine own, Jesus, I come to Thee!|| Out of the depths of ruin untold, Into the flock Thy love doth enfold, Ever Thy glorious face to behold, Jesus, I come to Thee!
